title: rcicrdiagnostics: Data quality diagnostics for reverse correlation experiments in social psychology using the rcicr package
description: A toolkit that runs data-quality diagnostics for reverse correlation experiments. Supports both the standard two-image forced-choice (2IFC) pipeline via the rcicr package and the Brief-RC pipeline (Schmitz, Rougier, & Yzerbyt, 2024). Designed to be run before computing classification images or information values so that silent data-processing errors are caught early.
